title: The Tay Son Uprising
summary: The three Tay Son brothers: Nguyen Nhac, Nguyen Hue, and Nguyen Lu, together with the people, rose up against injustice, opening a heroic chapter in history.

slides.text: Hey kids! In the 18th century, our country was divided into the Inner Realm (Dang Trong) and Outer Realm (Dang Ngoai). People lived in misery due to unfair rule.
slides.imagePrompt: A divided map of Vietnam with two dark shadows, sad farmers working under a hot sun, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: In the Tay Son region (Binh Dinh), there were three brothers of the Nguyen family: Nguyen Nhac, Nguyen Hue, and Nguyen Lu, who were martial arts masters and great patriots.
slides.imagePrompt: Three brothers in red warrior clothes practicing martial arts together, strong and united, mountain background, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: With the slogan: 'Take from the rich to give to the poor', the Tay Son uprising received enthusiastic support from tens of thousands of people.
slides.imagePrompt: A large crowd of enthusiastic people following the red flag of Tay Son, giving food to children, joy and hope, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: In 1771, starting from the lower Tay Son mountain region, the insurgent army began their journey to sweep away factions and unify the nation.
slides.imagePrompt: The Tay Son army marching with many red flags, elephants leading the way, sunrise over the mountains, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: Who were the three Tay Son brothers?
options: Nguyen Nhac, Nguyen Hue, Nguyen Lu
Le Loi, Nguyen Trai, Le Thanh Tong
Ly Thai To, Ly Thai Tông, Ly Thanh Tong
slides.answer: Nguyen Nhac, Nguyen Hue, Nguyen Lu

slides.question: What was the famous slogan of the Tay Son insurgent army?
options: Take from the rich to give to the poor
Take from the poor to give to the rich
slides.answer: Take from the rich to give to the poor
